scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:admin && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:apps && pnpm run build:plugins
scripts.build:backend:with-admin: pnpm run build:admin && pnpm run build:backend && rm -rf apps/backend/bin/admin && cp -R apps/admin/dist apps/backend/bin/admin
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @movscript/tokens build && pnpm --filter @movscript/ui build && pnpm --filter @movscript/plugin-sdk build
scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter movcli build && pnpm run build:agent && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend build && pnpm --filter movscript-admin build
scripts.package:desktop: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:backend:with-admin && pnpm run build:agent && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist
scripts.package:desktop:mac: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:backend:with-admin && pnpm run build:agent && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:mac
scripts.package:desktop:win: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:backend:with-admin && pnpm run build:agent && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:win
scripts.package:desktop:win:arm64: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:backend:with-admin && pnpm run build:agent && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:win:arm64
scripts.dev:frontend: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs MOVSCRIPT_BACKEND_POLICY=external pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dev
scripts.dev:frontend:local: pnpm run build:backend:with-admin && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs MOVSCRIPT_BACKEND_POLICY=spawn pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dev
scripts.dev:frontend:cloud: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs MOVSCRIPT_BACKEND_POLICY=cloud pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dev
